query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "occ-rag: optimal cognitive core for faithful question answering" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on a specific application domain (Persian Islamic QA) and a different architectural mechanism (iterative refinement for multi-hop reasoning) rather than the "Optimal Cognitive Core" mechanism or the specific linguistic extension of the "OCC-RAG" framework requested by the user.
